name: Install Simulink on Windows via mpm
description: Tests the full Windows workflow: confirmation, plan display, PowerShell safety gate, input file preparation, and install command generation
prompt: I need to install Simulink for R2025a on my Windows machine. Put it in C:\MATLAB\R2025a. My username is testuser.
expected_output: Agent confirms selections, displays installation plan, writes .ps1 scripts with Write tool, downloads mpm from correct URL, and never uses powershell.exe -Command

assertions.description: Agent confirms release, destination, and products before executing
assertions.expected: A confirmation message listing R2025a, C:\MATLAB\R2025a, and Simulink before any commands run

assertions.description: Agent displays an installation plan after confirmation and before execution
assertions.expected: A plan showing numbered steps: download mpm, prepare input file, run installation, verify

assertions.description: Agent writes PowerShell scripts via the Write file tool, never uses powershell.exe -Command
assertions.expected: All .ps1 files created with Write tool; invoked with powershell.exe ... -File <path>

assertions.description: Agent uses the correct mpm download URL for Windows

name: Install MATLAB and Signal Processing Toolbox on Linux
description: Tests Linux workflow: correct mpm URL, input file from GitHub, product lookup, and verification artifact
prompt: Install MATLAB and Signal Processing Toolbox for 25b on my Linux box. Install to /usr/local/MATLAB/R2025b.
expected_output: Agent expands '25b' to 'R2025b', downloads input file from GitHub, uses correct product identifiers from template, uses Linux mpm URL, and verifies completion artifact

assertions.expected: R2025b appears in confirmation and commands, not '25b'

assertions.description: Agent downloads the release-specific input file template from GitHub
Agent looks up exact product.<Name> identifiers from the input file rather than guessing
assertions.expected: product.MATLAB and product.Signal_Processing_Toolbox (or the exact identifier from the template)

assertions.description: Agent uses the correct mpm download URL for Linux
Agent checks for the completion artifact after installation

name: Windows safety gate enforcement
description: Tests that the agent strictly follows the Windows safety gate when generating PowerShell for mpm installation
prompt: Use mpm to install MATLAB R2025a to C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025a on Windows. My username is devuser.
expected_output: Agent creates scripts via Write tool (no heredoc or echo), uses timestamped working folder, elevates with Start-Process -Verb RunAs, and cleans up after verification

assertions.description: Agent never uses bash heredoc to create .ps1 files
Agent never uses echo redirection to create scripts
Agent creates a timestamped working folder in the user's temp directory
Agent uses Start-Process -Verb RunAs for the mpm install step on Windows
assertions.expected: Start-Process with -Verb RunAs in the install script

assertions.description: Agent cleans up the working folder after successful verification
assertions.expected: rm -rf or Remove-Item of the working folder after confirming matlab.exe exists
